# Eweeha — Wedding Cars in Lebanon

> Eweeha (eweeha.com) is a wedding car rental company in Lebanon. Chauffeur-driven decorated bridal cars, classic and convertible cars, full wedding convoys, and guest shuttle vans — serving every ceremony and venue across all of Lebanon, from Beirut to the mountains, the Bekaa, the South, and the North. Named after "Eweeha!", the celebratory cry that opens the radde chant at Lebanese weddings.

Key facts:
- All cars are chauffeur-driven (suited professional drivers); no self-drive
- Fuel and waiting time included; ribbon decoration included, fresh flowers coordinated with the couple's florist
- Indicative pricing: from about $250 for a single decorated bridal car up to about $1,500 for a full multi-car convoy, depending on cars, hours, and region — exact quotes at https://eweeha.com/booking
- Guest shuttles are operated with sister fleet Beirut Vans (beirutvans.com); booking cars + shuttles together costs less than booking separately
- Contact: WhatsApp/phone +961 70 971 841 · eweehalebanon@gmail.com · based in Beirut, serving all Lebanon, 7 days a week

## Services

- [Wedding Convoy](https://eweeha.com/services/wedding-convoy): decorated lead car + matching family and groomsmen cars, route scouting, zaffe-timed departures, grand arrivals
- [Bridal Car with Chauffeur](https://eweeha.com/services/bridal-car): one decorated car and suited chauffeur dedicated to the couple from prep to venue entrance
- [Classic & Convertible Cars](https://eweeha.com/services/photoshoot-cars): vintage classics and open-top cars for ceremony exits and photo sessions
- [Wedding Guest Shuttle](https://eweeha.com/services/guest-shuttle): vans and minibuses moving guests between hotels, ceremony, and venue, with late-night returns

## Coverage Areas

- [Beirut](https://eweeha.com/routes/wedding-cars-beirut): all neighborhoods, cathedral and downtown ceremonies, hotel pickups
- [Jounieh & Harissa](https://eweeha.com/routes/wedding-cars-jounieh-harissa): Our Lady of Lebanon, bay-view venues
- [Byblos & Batroun](https://eweeha.com/routes/wedding-cars-byblos-batroun): seaside ceremonies, old souks, beach venues
- [Broummana & the Metn](https://eweeha.com/routes/wedding-cars-broummana-metn): pine-forest summer weddings, Beit Misk
- [Aley & Bhamdoun](https://eweeha.com/routes/wedding-cars-aley-bhamdoun): old Damascus road summer wedding towns, Sawfar
- [Faraya & Faqra](https://eweeha.com/routes/wedding-cars-faraya-faqra): Faqra Club, Kfardebian chapels, mountain venues
- [Chouf & Deir el Qamar](https://eweeha.com/routes/wedding-cars-chouf-deir-el-qamar): historic stone villages, Beiteddine
- [Zahle & the Bekaa](https://eweeha.com/routes/wedding-cars-zahle-bekaa): vineyard weddings, Baalbek, West Bekaa
- [Saida, Jezzine & the South](https://eweeha.com/routes/wedding-cars-saida-south): Maghdouche, Tyre, Nabatieh
- [North Lebanon](https://eweeha.com/routes/wedding-cars-north-lebanon): Balamand, Ehden, Zgharta, Tripoli, Akkar
- [All areas & experiences](https://eweeha.com/routes): full list including classic-car photoshoots, convertible convoys, and zaffe arrivals

## Booking

- [Book online](https://eweeha.com/booking): instant quote from date, ceremony, and venue
- [The wedding fleet](https://eweeha.com/#fleet): live list of cars with photos and per-car pricing
- [FAQ](https://eweeha.com/faq): decoration, packages, timing, payment, and policy answers

## Optional

- [About Eweeha](https://eweeha.com/about): the story behind the name and the team
- [Contact](https://eweeha.com/contact): phone, WhatsApp, and email
- [Full knowledge base](https://eweeha.com/llms-full.txt): expanded plain-text details for AI assistants
